name: Infidelity, It's a Disease
overview: It is a romantic comedy that tells the story of Jiang Ye, a mainland Chinese sports student, and Zi Rui, a Taiwanese massage therapist, as they fall in love in Japan.

trailers.title: BL剧《花心，是一种病》5月1日上线｜The BL drama 'Infidelity, It's a Disease' ｜Offical Tranlier  premieres May 1st.
